summary: Iteration 116: Tested Duplicate Report feature end-to-end. Backend API and Frontend UI fully functional. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed all required features.

issues: Minor: Console shows HTML hydration warnings (span inside tbody, tr inside span) - React rendering issue in table but doesn't affect functionality

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All duplicate report and anomaly features verified)

seed_data_creation: Existing duplicate data used from database (18 duplicate groups: 9 sales, 9 expenses, 0 SP)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 116 verified all Duplicate Report features. The endpoint /api/duplicate-report/scan works with days parameter. Frontend shows summary cards (Total Groups, Sales, Expenses, SP, Potential Excess), tabs with badges, expandable groups, Original/Dup badges, and Remove buttons. Reports Hub has Duplicate Report card with 'New' badge. Sidebar has Duplicate Report link. Anomaly Detection accessible at /anomaly-detection with scan history. Dashboard widget shows anomaly stats.

1_duplicate_report_backend_scan.details: GET /api/duplicate-report/scan?days=30 returns summary with total_duplicate_groups, sales_groups, expense_groups, sp_groups, total_potential_excess plus sales, expenses, supplier_payments arrays. 8 backend tests passed.

2_duplicate_report_frontend_page.details: /duplicate-report page shows summary cards (18 Total Groups, 9 Sales, 9 Expenses, 0 SP, SAR 16,985.43 Potential Excess), tabs, and expandable duplicate groups.

3_duplicate_report_entry_actions.details: Expanding a group shows entries with 'Original' badge on first entry and 'Dup #N' badges with 'Remove' buttons on subsequent entries.

4_duplicate_report_in_reports_hub.details: Reports page at /reports has 'Duplicate Report' card with 'New' badge under Financial Reports section.

5_duplicate_report_sidebar_link.details: Sidebar under Reports section has 'Duplicate Report' link with Copy icon (nav-duplicate-report).

6_anomaly_detection_accessible.details: /anomaly-detection page loads showing scan history (15 scans), schedule settings (Daily at 07:00), and anomaly counts (1 critical, 13 warning per scan).

7_anomaly_dashboard_widget.details: Dashboard at / shows Anomaly Detection widget (data-testid='anomaly-dashboard-widget') with last scan date, 1 Critical, 13 Warning badges, and 'View Details' link.
